context: Tests whether the agent produces a templates/index.json that follows the prescribed 9-section structure for a Dawn-based subscription-box homepage: hero, how-it-works, tier-picker, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ, email capture — each using the correct Dawn section type and appearing in the specified order.

checklist.name: Hero section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'image-banner' that serves as the hero

checklist.name: How-it-works section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'multicolumn' used for the how-it-works step explanation

checklist.name: Tier picker section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'multicolumn' for the tier picker (3 tier blocks)

checklist.name: Recent drops section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'collage' for recent drops / past box images

checklist.name: Testimonials section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'multicolumn' used for testimonials

checklist.name: FAQ section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'collapsible-content' for the FAQ

checklist.name: Email capture section present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains a section of type 'newsletter' for email capture

checklist.name: Anchor sections present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains at least two sections of type 'custom-liquid' used as anchor injections (for #how-it-works and #tiers)

checklist.name: Section count
checklist.description: The 'order' array in templates/index.json contains at least 9 entries (hero + 2 anchors + how-it-works + tiers + drops + testimonials + FAQ + email capture)

checklist.name: Hero before how-it-works
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the image-banner hero section appears before the how-it-works multicolumn section

checklist.name: How-it-works before tiers
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the how-it-works section appears before the tier picker section

checklist.name: Tiers before testimonials
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the tier picker section appears before the testimonials section

checklist.name: FAQ before email capture
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the collapsible-content FAQ section appears before the newsletter email capture section

checklist.name: Three tier blocks
checklist.description: The tier picker multicolumn section contains exactly 3 column blocks (one per tier: Drip, Pour Over, Espresso Enthusiast)

checklist.name: Valid JSON output
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
